>更新时间：2026.06.25

# 微信支付 - 智慧商圈（普通商户）文档索引

> 面向商业综合体、商圈的数字化经营工具，整合支付、营销、会员、积分、权益等能力，实现场内商户联动运营。用户在商圈门店消费后可享自动积分及出行服务、门店服务等积分权益。增加用户会员价值感，拉动商圈会员活跃与消费。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012068030.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4016111728.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012068086.md)
- [开发接入准备](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012068068.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4020807300.md)

## API 列表
- [商圈会员积分服务授权结果通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012285836.md)
- [商圈会员场内支付结果通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012285856.md)
- [商圈会员积分同步](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534698.md)
- [商圈会员场内退款结果通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012285869.md)
- [商圈会员积分服务授权查询](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534848.md)
- [商圈会员待积分状态查询](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534994.md)
- [商圈会员停车状态同步](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012535502.md)

## 请求示例
- [商圈会员停车状态同步 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012535502-curl.md)
- [商圈会员停车状态同步 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012535502-java.md)
- [商圈会员停车状态同步 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012535502-go.md)
- [商圈会员待积分状态查询 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534994-curl.md)
- [商圈会员待积分状态查询 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534994-java.md)
- [商圈会员待积分状态查询 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534994-go.md)
- [商圈会员积分同步 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534698-curl.md)
- [商圈会员积分同步 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534698-java.md)
- [商圈会员积分同步 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534698-go.md)
- [商圈会员积分服务授权查询 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534848-curl.md)
- [商圈会员积分服务授权查询 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534848-java.md)
- [商圈会员积分服务授权查询 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534848-go.md)
